title: helianthus arenicola
intro: Helianthus arenicola, also known as sand sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory properties, which have been found to aid in the treatment of various ailments. The health benefits of Helianthus arenicola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
